name: Tex-Mex Tortilla Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole large chicken breasts (about 2 lb.), skinned and boned
1 can Whole kernel corn (8 3/4 oz.), drained
4 oz Monterey Jack Cheese, shredded (about 1 cup)
1 Avocado, peeled, seeded and cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1-inch cubes; set aside.
2. In a large saucepan, combine water, beef broth, chicken broth, undrained tomatoes, chopped onion, and green pepper. Bring to boiling.
3. Add the chicken; reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add corn, chili powder, cumin, and black pepper. Simmer, covered, for another 10 minutes.
5. To serve, place crushed tortilla chips into each bowl.
6. Ladle soup over the chips.
7. Sprinkle with cheese, avocado, and cilantro.
8. Serve with lime wedges.
Makes 6 servings.
